/usr/bin/ar qc libfirestaff_nexus.a CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_champions.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_combat.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_creatures.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_dmdf_model.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_dungeon.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_engine.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_game.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_iso_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_magic.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_math3d.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_rasterizer.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_saturn_font.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_text.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_nexus.dir/src/nexus/nexus_v1_viewport.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libfirestaff_nexus.a
